data.name: ARTitle
data.value: Gralcall

data.name: LudirexTitle
data.value: Ludirex

data.name: Quote1AR
data.value:
Identify target images :
Choose, with our support, one or more target images.

data.name: Quote2AR
data.value:
Images, videos, 3D objects :
Show what you like by framing target images.

data.name: Quote3AR
data.value:
Customizable:
The graphical interface is totally customizable.

data.name: Quote4AR
data.value:
Back Office management:
Consult your Backoffice for an analysis of views/scans.

data.name: GralCallDescripton
data.value:
Graldev is present in the world of Augmented Reality with the Gralcall project.
Gralcall is a web application initially born from a project in collaboration with our partner Associazione Manthano ETS.
We have in fact created a tourist and cultural itinerary to describe some Italian villages with the help of AR and informative videos.
Today Gralcall has evolved and is now a versatile and customizable tool for any need.
The areas of use of Gralcall range from tourism to catering, from advertising to gaming.
Contact us and we will offer you our support to realize your Augmented Reality project!

data.name: ARSubTitle
data.value: Our Augmented Reality offer

data.name: GeordieTitle
data.value: Geordie

data.name: GeordieSubTitle
data.value: Our solution to help you manage your online sales.

data.name: GeordieDescription
data.value:
Manage your stores in an organized and simple way. Geordie is a multiplatform web app that can be used on PCs, smartphones and tablets, highly customizable according to your needs.
Geordie guides you in bulk management of your listings and controls exclusive user-level access to orders so you don't make mistakes.
Geordie updates automatically, connecting 24/365 to the most popular sales platforms, and allows you to communicate with them also for collections, labels and courier tracking numbers.
Premium management requires our already trained staff to do all the work for you.
Contact us for a personalized demo!

data.name: Quote1Geordie
data.value:
Customizable web app
Modular web app with functions that can be activated according to needs

data.name: Quote2Geordie
data.value:
Safe
Protection against unauthorized access with instant sending of security emails and the possibility of IP blocking

data.name: Quote3Geordie
data.value:
Easy to use
Graphical interface designed to simplify the use of the entire software

data.name: Quote4Geordie
data.value:
Automated
Automatic scheduled reception of new orders, setting of shipping dates and tracking numbers

data.name: GalleryGordieDesc
data.value: Some screenshots from Geordie

data.name: Reviews1Geordie
data.value:
Since Geordie has been managing our online stores, not only have sales increased significantly, but the entire ordering system has accelerated. Geordie, in fact, collects and manages all orders, automatically saving them in the management system and constantly updating them.
Since Geordie has been working for us we no longer have problems with multiple shipments of goods as it allows a single operator to take charge of the order.

data.name: Reviews2Geordie
data.value:
Geordie has contributed to the increase in our turnover. It is a very simple and intuitive management software with excellent usability. It was possible to request customized features for our online shop.
Thanks to high customization, our workflow is always under control so as to eliminate errors and speed up processes.

data.name: ArGalleryDesc
data.value: An example of an AR project created with Gralcall in collaboration with our cultural partner Associazione Manthano ETS

data.name: LudirexSubtitle
data.value: The social network designed for the gaming community

data.name: LudirexDescription
data.value:
Through a social platform, Ludirex wants to represent the main meeting point between online players from all over the world.
A "digital courtyard" for gamers where they can interact and get to know each other, find playmates with whom to collaborate, take sides or challenge each other.
We therefore propose a new model of socialization which, around the passion for a game, encourages the birth of new acquaintances and new bonds.

data.name: LudiSocial
data.value: See also on social media:
